markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call to explore potential collaboration between Reuben and GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/KsToYU6kCLAEyh9m-y2ZZcWW4UhEZV15?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**GrowthX's Model:** An AI-powered agency ($12–13M ARR in 1 year) that treats content as a product, using AI agents to scale organic awareness for clients like Webflow.](https://fathom.video/share/KsToYU6kCLAEyh9m-y2ZZcWW4UhEZV15?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [**Reuben's Expertise:** Leads SEO at MaintainX, focusing on bottom-of-funnel content ("deal-breaker questions") and pioneering AI search (AEO/GEO) attribution via UTMs and sales call analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/KsToYU6kCLAEyh9m-y2ZZcWW4UhEZV15?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
  - [**Potential Roles:** Two paths were discussed: an **AEO Playbook Lead** (internal, strategic) or an **Account Director** (client-facing, strategic advisor).](https://fathom.video/share/KsToYU6kCLAEyh9m-y2ZZcWW4UhEZV15?tab=summary&timestamp=1634.0)
  - [**Cultural Fit:** Reuben is highly aligned with GrowthX's systems-thinking philosophy, having followed the company's journey and attended its workshops.](https://fathom.video/share/KsToYU6kCLAEyh9m-y2ZZcWW4UhEZV15?tab=summary&timestamp=2055.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Model & Needs

  - [**Core Philosophy:** Prove that AI can replace/augment human labor in knowledge work, starting with marketing.](https://fathom.video/share/KsToYU6kCLAEyh9m-y2ZZcWW4UhEZV15?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
  - [**Agency as a Product:** A system of AI agents and human experts generates content at scale.](https://fathom.video/share/KsToYU6kCLAEyh9m-y2ZZcWW4UhEZV15?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
      - [**Example:** For Webflow, produces 30–50 integration docs weekly.](https://fathom.video/share/KsToYU6kCLAEyh9m-y2ZZcWW4UhEZV15?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [**Rapid Growth:** $12–13M ARR in \~1 year; team is 80–90 people and client-constrained (next availability is late January).](https://fathom.video/share/KsToYU6kCLAEyh9m-y2ZZcWW4UhEZV15?tab=summary&timestamp=1901.0)
  - [**Key Needs:**](https://fathom.video/share/KsToYU6kCLAEyh9m-y2ZZcWW4UhEZV15?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
      - [**AEO Playbook:** Define a standard, repeatable process for AI search optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/KsToYU6kCLAEyh9m-y2ZZcWW4UhEZV15?tab=summary&timestamp=1829.0)
      - [**Account Directors:** Strategic advisors for clients (VPs/CMOs) on growth.](https://fathom.video/share/KsToYU6kCLAEyh9m-y2ZZcWW4UhEZV15?tab=summary&timestamp=1753.0)

### Reuben's AEO/GEO Approach

  - [**Background:** 8 years in SEO (edutech, agency, FreshBooks, MaintainX) with a Computer Science degree.](https://fathom.video/share/KsToYU6kCLAEyh9m-y2ZZcWW4UhEZV15?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
  - [**Strategy:** Prioritizes bottom-of-funnel content to reduce CAC.](https://fathom.video/share/KsToYU6kCLAEyh9m-y2ZZcWW4UhEZV15?tab=summary&timestamp=808.0)
      - [**"Deal-breaker questions":** Yes/no questions that are critical for a prospect's evaluation (e.g., specific integrations).](https://fathom.video/share/KsToYU6kCLAEyh9m-y2ZZcWW4UhEZV15?tab=summary&timestamp=838.0)
      - [**Acquisition content:** Listicles and comparison pages.](https://fathom.video/share/KsToYU6kCLAEyh9m-y2ZZcWW4UhEZV15?tab=summary&timestamp=808.0)
  - [**Attribution & Measurement:**](https://fathom.video/share/KsToYU6kCLAEyh9m-y2ZZcWW4UhEZV15?tab=summary&timestamp=1099.0)
      - [**Primary:** UTM-tagged referral traffic from LLMs (ChatGPT, Perplexity).](https://fathom.video/share/KsToYU6kCLAEyh9m-y2ZZcWW4UhEZV15?tab=summary&timestamp=1108.0)
      - [**Secondary:** "How did you hear about us?" form and sales call analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/KsToYU6kCLAEyh9m-y2ZZcWW4UhEZV15?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Believes current tools (Profound, Scrunch) are directional, as their API limits (e.g., 1 SERP fanout) don't reflect real-world user behavior.](https://fathom.video/share/KsToYU6kCLAEyh9m-y2ZZcWW4UhEZV15?tab=summary&timestamp=1428.0)

### Potential Roles & Fit

  - [**AEO Playbook Lead:**](https://fathom.video/share/KsToYU6kCLAEyh9m-y2ZZcWW4UhEZV15?tab=summary&timestamp=1829.0)
      - [**Focus:** Internal strategy to standardize the AEO process across all client accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/KsToYU6kCLAEyh9m-y2ZZcWW4UhEZV15?tab=summary&timestamp=1829.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Ensures consistency and prevents issues that arise from a non-standardized approach.](https://fathom.video/share/KsToYU6kCLAEyh9m-y2ZZcWW4UhEZV15?tab=summary&timestamp=1829.0)
  - [**Account Director:**](https://fathom.video/share/KsToYU6kCLAEyh9m-y2ZZcWW4UhEZV15?tab=summary&timestamp=1753.0)
      - [**Focus:** Client-facing strategic advisor for marketing VPs/CMOs.](https://fathom.video/share/KsToYU6kCLAEyh9m-y2ZZcWW4UhEZV15?tab=summary&timestamp=1753.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Fills a key need for senior strategic leadership on client accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/KsToYU6kCLAEyh9m-y2ZZcWW4UhEZV15?tab=summary&timestamp=1753.0)
  - [**Reuben's Preference:** Open to both, but wants to remain hands-on with SEO/AEO strategy, not solely focused on client experience.](https://fathom.video/share/KsToYU6kCLAEyh9m-y2ZZcWW4UhEZV15?tab=summary&timestamp=2108.0)
  - [**Compensation:** Stated range of $155k–$160k CAD.](https://fathom.video/share/KsToYU6kCLAEyh9m-y2ZZcWW4UhEZV15?tab=summary&timestamp=2615.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jason:** Share detailed role descriptions for the AEO Playbook Lead and Account Director positions.](https://fathom.video/share/KsToYU6kCLAEyh9m-y2ZZcWW4UhEZV15?tab=summary&timestamp=2247.0)
  - [**Jason:** Discuss the compensation range with the team.](https://fathom.video/share/KsToYU6kCLAEyh9m-y2ZZcWW4UhEZV15?tab=summary&timestamp=2615.0)
  - [**Jason:** Schedule a follow-up call with Reuben and Marcel.](https://fathom.video/share/KsToYU6kCLAEyh9m-y2ZZcWW4UhEZV15?tab=summary&timestamp=2699.0)
